infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses the camera to take photos and videos on your command.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses the microphone for voice recording and commands.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nexus AI accesses your photo library to select images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Nexus AI saves photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses your location to answer 'where am I' and navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nexus AI uses your location for location-aware AI assistance.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Nexus AI reads contacts to call and message people by name.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Nexus AI creates and reads calendar events on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Nexus AI sets reminders on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses speech recognition for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Nexus AI reads motion sensors for device awareness.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Nexus AI may use Bluetooth for device connectivity.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses tracking for personalized AI assistance.

plugins.photosPermission: Nexus AI accesses your photos to select images on your command.
plugins.cameraPermission: Nexus AI uses the camera to take photos and videos for you.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Nexus AI uses your location for AI assistance.

plugins.contactsPermission: Nexus AI accesses contacts so you can call or message people by name.

plugins.calendarPermission: Nexus AI creates and reads your calendar events.
plugins.remindersPermission: Nexus AI can create reminders on your behalf.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Nexus AI uses Face ID for secure authentication.

plugins.microphonePermission: Nexus AI uses the microphone for voice recording.
